name: Waze
description: Community-based navigation app providing real-time traffic and road information via crowdsourced driver reports.

years.notes: Pre-Pentagram Wazer character — gradient white/gray body with dark outline. Era 2012–2020. Vectorized from a 1170×1102 raster; the source gradient is flattened to a layered solid-fill approximation.

Pentagram redesign (July 2020, designer Natasha Jen). Flat white Wazer on light-blue (#93C4D3) circle. Mono variant strips the background circle to keep the mark legible at small sizes — same convention as Chrome / Firefox / Edge / Brave.
